rationale: Gov't Code §2256.021 governs eligibility of investments based on minimum credit ratings. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: An investment that requires a minimum rating under this subchapter does not qualify as an authorized investment during the period the investment does not have the minimum rating.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses public funds investment ratings, not property tax exemptions.
